label: Reviews Display
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for rendering customer reviews/testimonials as a server-rendered card grid with author name, optional avatar, star rating and verified-source attribution (Google, TripAdvisor, Yelp, own site). Renders schema.org Review JSON-LD for rich SERP snippets. Reviews data is static content in project-input — no live Google/Yelp scraping. Hard alternatives (google-places-reviews, trustpilot-widget) are planned imports for sites that need real-time review pulls.
